title: Craftable Saplings
description: With this mod you can crafting all saplings and fungus
body:
With this mod you can finally craft all saplings and fungus.  
The recipe is very simple: you need a stick and a leaves of the type of sapling you want.  
For example: a stick + an oak leaves = oak sapling.  
For fungus you always need a stick but instead of leaves you have to use a nether wart block (crimson fungus) or a warped nether block (warped fungus)

***The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)***  
***The mod is compatible with: Biomes O' Plenty  (it's possible craft the saplings introduced by Biomes O' Plenty)***

![Example of recipe](https://i.imgur.com/9m3ZQNy.png)
